description: Customer memberships, invoice templates, membership types, recurring services, recurring service events, recurring service types

env_var_specs.name: ST_CLIENT_ID
env_var_specs.description: ServiceTitan OAuth2 client_id for the integration. Used by the auth login flow to exchange for a bearer token at https://auth.servicetitan.io/connect/token. Whitespace is stripped defensively.

env_var_specs.name: ST_CLIENT_SECRET
env_var_specs.description: ServiceTitan OAuth2 client_secret paired with ST_CLIENT_ID. Whitespace is stripped defensively (a known JKA env gotcha that produced opaque invalid_client 400s).

tools.name: invoice-templates_create
tools.description: Creates new invoice template. Required: tenant. Optional: items. Returns the new ModificationResponse.

params.name: tenant
params.description: Tenant ID

params.name: items

tools.description: Gets invoice template specified by ID. Required: id, tenant. Returns the MembershipsV2InvoiceTemplateResponse.

tools.name: invoice-templates_get-list
tools.description: Please note this endpoint does not allow to enumerate all invoice templates. Use the Customer Membership endpoint (for billing template) or Recurring Service endpoint (for invoice template) to get invoice template IDs. Required: tenant, ids. Returns array of MembershipsV2InvoiceTemplateResponse.

params.name: tenant
params.description: Tenant ID

params.name: ids
params.description: Perform lookup by multiple IDs (maximum 50)

params.name: active
params.description: Whether invoice template is active

params.name: createdById
params.description: ID of the user that created invoice template

params.name: createdOn
params.description: Invoice template creation date

params.name: items
params.description: Invoice template items

params.name: name
params.description: Invoice template name (used only for shared invoice templates)

tools.name: memberships_customer-create
tools.description: Creates membership sale invoice. Required: tenant, businessUnitId, customerId, durationBillingId, recurringServiceAction, saleTaskId. Optional: locationId, recurringLocationId. Returns the new MembershipsV2MembershipSaleInvoiceCreateResponse.

params.name: tenant
params.description: Tenant ID

params.name: businessUnitId
params.description: Business unit ID

params.name: customerId
params.description: ID of the customer you are creating the Membership Sale Invoice for

params.name: durationBillingId
params.description: ID of the duration/billing option to be used

params.name: locationId
params.description: Discount location ID of this membership (null if all locations)

params.name: recurringLocationId
params.description: The location at which recurring services are scheduled (null if all locations)

params.name: recurringServiceAction
params.description: Required if RecurringLocationId is set. Determines how many of the customer's locations that recurring services should be added to: all, single, or none (which deletes existing recurring services).

params.name: saleTaskId
params.description: ID of the sale task that is creating the membership

tools.name: memberships_customer-update
tools.description: Updates specified customer membership in 'patch' mode. Required: id, tenant. Optional: billingTemplateId, businessUnitId, cancellationBalanceInvoiceId (plus 14 more). Returns the updated ModificationResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Customer membership ID

params.name: tenant
params.description: Tenant ID

params.name: billingTemplateId
params.description: The ID of the invoice template used to bill this membership. Can either be a 'settings template' (when invoice template is shared – in this case new invoice template will be created), or be a new invoice template created specifically for this customer membership.

params.name: businessUnitId
params.description: ID of the Business Unit associated with this membership

params.name: cancellationBalanceInvoiceId
params.description: The ID of the invoice created upon membership cancellation in order to zero out the deferred revenue balance.

params.name: cancellationInvoiceId
params.description: The ID of the invoice optionally created upon membership cancellation in order to charge (or refund) the customer if deferred revenue balance is not 0.

params.name: from
params.description: The starting date of this membership

params.name: initialDeferredRevenue
params.description: The amount of deferred revenue that this membership should start with that is not accounted for in the sale task.

params.name: locationId
params.description: Discount location ID of this membership (null if all locations)

params.name: memo
params.description: Memo text field

params.name: nextScheduledBillDate
params.description: Next date that this membership will be billed on

params.name: paymentMethodId
params.description: The ID of the payment method (credit card or bank account) that should be used for this membership. This field is mutually exclusive with payment type. Only one or the other can be set at a time.

params.name: paymentTypeId
params.description: The payment type (cash, check, etc) that should be used for this membership. This field is mutually exclusive with payment type. Only one or the other can be set at a time. Setting payment type means we will not automatically use a payment method to bill the membership and payment will have to be collected manually.

params.name: recurringLocationId
params.description: The location at which recurring services are scheduled (null if all locations)

params.name: recurringServiceAction
params.description: Required if RecurringLocationId is set. Determines how many of the customer's locations that recurring services should be added to: all, single, or none (which deletes existing recurring services).

params.name: renewalMembershipTaskId
params.description: The ID of the service that will be used as the default to renew this membership.

params.name: soldById
params.description: ID of the user that was credited for the sale of this membership

params.name: status
params.description: Status of the membership

params.name: to
params.description: The end date of this membership (null if ongoing)

tools.name: recurring-service-events_mark-complete_location-recurring-service-events
tools.description: Marking an event as complete links the job with provided JobID to the given Location Recurring Service Event. It will also copy over invoice items to the Job Invoice corresponding to the Invoice Template of the Location Recurring Service the Event was generated from. Required: id, tenant, jobId. Returns the new ModificationResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Recurring service event ID

params.name: tenant
params.description: Tenant ID

params.name: jobId
params.description: The job ID that the event is marked as completed/incompleted on

tools.name: recurring-service-events_mark-incomplete_location-recurring-service-events
tools.description: Marking an event as incomplete unlinks the job with provided JobID to the given Location Recurring Service Event. It will also delete the invoice items that were copied over when the Location Recurring Service Event was marked as completed on the Job. Required: id, tenant, jobId. Returns the new ModificationResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Recurring service event ID

params.name: tenant
params.description: Tenant ID

params.name: jobId
params.description: The job ID that the event is marked as completed/incompleted on

tools.name: recurring-services_location-update
tools.description: Updates specified recurring service in 'patch' mode. Required: id, tenant. Optional: active, businessUnitId, campaignId (plus 21 more). Returns the updated ModificationResponse.

params.name: id
params.description: Recurring service ID

params.name: tenant
params.description: Tenant ID

params.name: active
params.description: Whether recurring service is active

params.name: businessUnitId
params.description: Business unit ID

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Campaign ID

params.name: durationLength
params.description: The duration length for the given duration type

params.name: durationType
params.description: The recurrence duration type

params.name: estimatedPayrollCost
params.description: Estimated payroll cost

params.name: from
params.description: Beginning date of recurring service

params.name: invoiceTemplateForFollowingYearsId
params.description: Invoice template ID for the 2nd year and following (for ongoing memberships)

params.name: invoiceTemplateId
params.description: Invoice template ID

params.name: jobStartTime
params.description: Job start time

params.name: jobSummary
params.description: Job summary

params.name: jobTypeId
params.description: Job type ID

params.name: memo
params.description: Memo

params.name: name
params.description: Recurring service name

params.name: preferredTechnicianIds
params.description: List specifying IDs of preferred technicians for this location recurring service

params.name: priority
params.description: Recurring service priority

params.name: recurrenceDayOfNthWeek
params.description: Enum value corresponding to which day of the week this recurring service recurs when RecurrenceType is NthWeekdayOfMonth. Used with RecurrenceWeek.

params.name: recurrenceDaysOfWeek
params.description: A list specifying which days of the week this recurring service recurs when RecurrenceType is Weekly

params.name: recurrenceInterval
params.description: The recurrence interval for the given recurrence type. Can be 0 when RecurrenceType is Seasonal.

params.name: recurrenceMonths
params.description: A list of months when the recurring service occurs, if it is a seasonal recurrence type

params.name: recurrenceType
params.description: The recurrence type (e.g. Daily, Weekly, Monthly, etc.)

params.name: recurrenceWeek
params.description: Enum value corresponding to which week of the month this recurring service recurs when RecurrenceType is NthWeekdayOfMonth. Used with RecurrenceDayOfNthWeek.

params.name: recurringServiceTypeId
params.description: Recurring Service Type ID

params.name: tagTypeIds
params.description: List specifying IDs of Tag Types associated with this location recurring service
